reviews.review_description:
Found this to be quite a relaxing and unique little app although needs some polishing and the UI is somewhat confusing at first. I did have an issue with reaching maximum number of strokes quite quickly when I attempted to create a teapot so hopefully the developer can work on that issue and increase the stroke limitation.

To create the teapot I used a technique not unlike using a clay potter's wheel. Instead of a wheel I simply sat in my rotating office chair and created the pot from the inside out by spinning myself around many times whilst holding down the paint button and gradually increasing the height of the walls of the teapot (similar to creating a clay coil pot in real world). This gave me a fairly symmetrical teapot shape to work with before adding a handle and spout freehand.

reviews.review_title: 🎨 Creative MR Fun with Endless Fun!
reviews.review_description:
Drawee is a brilliant mixed reality drawing app with an intuitive interface that makes creativity feel effortless. You can paint hearts, stars, or use shapes as stencils — each idea feels fresh and unique. The ability to cast realistic shadows, resize, rotate, and move your drawings (individually or all at once) adds a whole new layer of immersion.

The clarity of the drawings is remarkable — crisp, sharp, and almost 5D in depth and feel. A fantastic creative utility with huge potential and lots of fun to explore!

The app allows you to take inspiration from your environment by selecting color patterns through the passthrough camera.

You can then use a handful of tools to generate 3d assets. 

Looking forward to the export functionality.
While i am not the best artist, being able to draw in 3d using colors from your own space is very cool and well worth it!
This is amazing.Drawee  super smooth and intuitive. Drawing in 3D space feels natural, and the GLB export works perfectly. Makes it easy to turn VR sketches into real 3D models
